turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, hello, I want to book a, uh, dermatology appointment. My skin has been breaking out really badly.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! We have Dr. Kavitha Rao in our dermatology department. She's available this Wednesday at 4 PM or next Monday at 11 AM. Any preference?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. Can I have your full name and mobile number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Neha Gupta. And my number is 7890123456.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Appointment confirmed for Ms. Neha Gupta with Dr. Kavitha Rao this Wednesday at 4 PM. Please carry a valid ID. Is there anything else I can help you with?
